subcodes.first_line: O thou who art assured of the signs of God! In this rose-garden thou hast appeared with a radiant countenance and become as an unfurled scroll [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای موقن بایات الله در این گلشن با رخی روشن محشور شدی و لوحی منشور گشتی در
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @spiritual transformation, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @humility; meekness; lowliness, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
